# The Clean Burn

> Breaking Free From Porn Without Shame

The Clean Burn is a long-form editorial site about porn addiction recovery. It publishes evidence-based articles grounded in neuroscience, somatic practices, and consciousness traditions. The site contains 300 original articles across five categories: The Brain, The Cost, The Recovery, The Rewire, and The Return.

## Author
Kalesh — Consciousness Teacher & Writer
Website: https://kalesh.love

## Categories
- The Brain: Neuroscience of porn addiction — dopamine, escalation, desensitization
- The Cost: What porn takes — relationships, intimacy, performance, emotional depth
- The Recovery: Practical protocols — withdrawal, relapse prevention, support
- The Rewire: Somatic practices, mindfulness, breathwork, neural rewiring
- The Return: Real intimacy, healthy sexuality, authentic connection

## Content Approach
- Cross-traditional: Buddhism, Taoism, Vedanta, neuroscience equally
- Named researcher citations (Gary Wilson, Andrew Huberman, Gabor Maté, etc.)
- First-person lived experience markers
- 30% spiritual/healing thread woven throughout
- No shame-based language, no moralistic framing

## URL Structure
- Articles: https://cleanburn.love/{category-slug}/{article-slug}
- Categories: https://cleanburn.love/category/{category-slug}
- About: https://cleanburn.love/about
